name: Codebase Memory MCP (repo-scale structural graph)
description: Installs codebase-memory-mcp (https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp), a single static binary that indexes the workspace into a persistent knowledge graph and exposes it as a stdio MCP server: architecture overview, call-graph traversal, dead-code detection, HTTP/gRPC cross-service linking, git-diff impact analysis, and Cypher-like graph queries.

version.description: Release tag of codebase-memory-mcp to install (e.g. 'v0.8.0'), or 'latest'.

ui.description: Install the UI variant, which adds an optional 3D graph-visualization web UI (localhost:9749).

autoIndex.description: Enable the binary's own lazy auto-indexing of new projects on first MCP session connection (config: auto_index). Independent of indexOnStart, which eagerly indexes the workspace at container start.

indexOnStart.description: Eagerly index the workspace project at container start (postStartCommand) so the MCP tools work out of the box on the first call. Idempotent (skips already-indexed projects), uses 'fast' mode (no similarity/semantic edges, no .codebase-memory persistence artifact), and runs in the background.

autoRegister.description: Merge an entry into the workspace .mcp.json so MCP clients auto-discover the server. Set false if claude-manager (or another tool) owns .mcp.json.
